description: Atmospheric conditions with a modern, urban feel.
weather: All lights go out, leaving only darkness and uncertainty.
on the hottest day of summer
Pavement shimmers and everyone seeks shade.
An unexpected wall of snow burying roads and cars.
as sirens echo in the distance
Wailing emergency sounds bouncing off buildings.
Umbrellas collide on crowded sidewalks as traffic crawls.
Water rising fast, turning streets into rivers.
Clear blue sky and warm light on every surface.
Faulty lamps buzzing and cutting in and out.
on the first day of spring
Warm breezes carrying the scent of new growth.
Lightning cracks and thunder rattles windows after midnight.
as autumn fog rolls through the streets
Dense mist turning familiar streets into mazes.
as the first snow of winter falls
Delicate flakes settling on rooftops and shoulders.
Thick, humid air that clings to the skin.
Ice pellets bouncing off cars and sidewalks.
under neon lights in the rain
Colorful reflections streaking across wet pavement.
